item.title: “Proud Boys” is trending on social media, here’s why…
item.description:
https://youtu.be/NC1MNGFHR58?si=qZIcLONkBF6wwWYK
Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com or to vote.gov . If you make use of mail-in voting, check trackvote.org to find out if your state offers a ballot tracking service. If your state permits early voting, consider taking advantage of that privilege! Certain states continue to “accidentally” purge legally registered voters from their rolls, so check to make sure you haven’t been purged. Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. #vote
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight

item.title: Try Reading These Instead
item.description: So, these are way easier to digest and I hadn’t seen this here yet. Let’s get this done y’all. Vote vote vote blue up and down the ballot to keep this country from going back. Only forward. https://stopproject2025comic.org

item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: Gav's Tavern
item.description: Hi, I'm Skeleton Claw. I usually draw short, funny comics like this: https://imgur.com/gallery/life-as-half-human-half-lizard-hybrid-rNIjAnQ or this: https://imgur.com/gallery/little-secret-rvF9Xso But for some reason, I decided to try something different and tell a story. I hope you liked it. It was definitely a challenge, largely because I'm not great at sticking with things once the "interesting" part has been figured out. But I did it, and I'm more or less happy with the result. If you enjoy my work you can follow me at these places: Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/skeleton_claw/ Reddit: https://reddit.com/r/skeletonclaw Twitter: https://x.com/skeletonclaw Threads: https://www.threads.net/@skeleton_claw Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/skeletonclaw/ Or if you really like my stuff and want me to know it: https://www.patreon.com/skeletonclaw Cheers, Skelly
item.dc:creator: TheRealSkeletonClaw

item.title: Images of Note: Body of Christ Soup
item.description:
They do
:)
Skibbidi
me
yeah
In the same vain, A cat in Ancient Egyptian is called a "Mu".
Y O U
:V
proot
The fact companies go after you for pirating things they refuse to sell you just goes to show you where their priorities are.
uwu
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging https://bsky.app/profile/abbiistabbii.bsky.social For Bluesky?

item.dc:creator: gennisib

item.title: The 480.5th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - SPOOPY SEASON, Week 3 -- I forgot I uploaded these last week and didn't make them public!
item.description:
Yes
Me
I thought they drained your life energy. Like Capitalism does.
I have a theory that Skeletons don't turn evil when they come back from the grave. They're actually evil for their entire existence, which is why the Human body is an absolute travesty. That being said, they're still less evil than most people.
We need this crossover
Yes please
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world' Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays
Chibi animation is the worst thing to happen to Teen Titans.
SOUND AND DATA WARNING! Several videos below
I'd pick Mila Jovovich (Resident Evil), Allison Hannigan (Buffy Era) and Christina Ricci
Yes please
A neighbor of mine gave out Glorbox in 2019 and I think that might be why we are where we are...
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq -----FRESHLY UPDATED----- #Spooky #Spoopy #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Would we accept this behavior from our sons?
item.description: Race and gender were specific in these examples because of Trump's race and gender. It was done deliberately. We shouldn't accept this from our children (or spouses, coworkers, clergy, roommates, etc etc etc) regardless of race or gender.
item.dc:creator: ProfanePatriot

item.title: Colin Farrell finishes Dublin Marathon while pushing friend in a wheelchair
item.description: Source: https://www.cnn.com/2024/10/28/entertainment/colin-farrell-marathon-wheelchair-scli-intl/index.html Colin Farrell is way underrated for the good things he does. He has a son that has Angelman syndrome that he loves dearly. He's truly a compassionate person.
